## FileSystemReadStream type

An alias for the Node.js `fs.ReadStream` object.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type FileSystemReadStream = fs.ReadStream;
```

## Remarks

This avoids the need to import the `fs` package when using the [FileSystem](./node-core-library.filesystem.md) API.
